estimated_runtime: 1-4 hours for one disk cache and four 100-epoch approximately 3.9M-parameter fits on one A6000; watcher is authoritative
claim_scope: fourth fixed-key PRESENT r3 matched-control confirmation of the OPA1-selected PRESENT-SPN architecture; not r4 evidence, full-ciphertext recovery, broad cross-key statistics, or SOTA
launch_policy: Launch only from an explicit pushed commit in a clean short-path run-owned clone under G:\lxy through cmd.exe /c on physical GPU0; verify the exact OPA1 gate hash; keep cache, progress, checkpoints, logs, results, and archive under G:\lxy; require 32 result rows, 400 history rows, four checkpoints, valid protocol/execution checks, a verified result branch, and local tmux retrieval.
